name: keba-kecontact

metadata.name: keba_kecontact
metadata.summary: A python library to communicate with the KEBA charging stations via udp

documentation:
# KEBA KeContact

This is python library to control KEBA charging stations, in specific the P20, P30 and the BMW wallbox.
Commands were taken from the [UDP Programming Manual](https://www.keba.com/web/downloads/e-mobility/KeContact_P20_P30_UDP_ProgrGuide_en.pdf).
The library was written for the usage in [Home Assistant](https://www.home-assistant.io/).

## Commands
The following commands are implemented so far:

### request_data

### set_failsafe
The failsafe function is a way to detect a failure of the network communication between the UDP application and the charging station.
In this case, the charging station will fall into a state with a definable current limitation.
By default, the failsafe function is disabled and must be enabled by the application.

Parameters:
- timeout in seconds (default = 30 s)
- fallback_value in ampere (default = 6 A) 
- persist (default = 0)

### set_energy
The command setenergy can be used to set an energy limit for an already running or the next charging session.
If the energy limit is greater than or equal to the value in the E pres field of report 3 the charging session will be stopped and the device will be deactivated (similar to ena 0).
All settings caused by setenergy are not permanent and are reset at the next time the device registers that the EV plug is pulled from a vehicle inlet or the charging station is restarted.

Parameters:
- energy in kWh (default = 0 kWh)

### set_current
This command sets the current limit of the running charging process.

Parameters:
- current in ampere (default = 0 A)

### set_text
This command displays a text on the display of the charger.

Parameters:
- text to show on the display
- min time to show the text before next text is shown (default = 2 s)
- max time to show the text (default = 10 s)

### start
This command authorizes a charging process with the given RFID tag and RFID class.

Parameters:
- rfid tag as 8 byte hex string, identifier of RFID card
- rfid class as 10 byte hex string, classifier of RFID card 

### stop
This command stops a charging process with the given RFID tag.

Parameters:
- rfid tag as 8 byte hex string, identifier of RFID card

### enable
The enable command can be used to permanently disable the system by using the parameter 0.
After receiving ena 0 the device will be disabled until it is rebooted or ena 1 or currtime are used.
The execution of ena 0 will take approximately 1 second.
If ena 0 is used, then no other command should be sent for 2 seconds to ensure an undisturbed execution of the disable command.

Parameters:
- ena in [0,1]

### unlock_socket
(not tested yet)

functions.name: keba_kecontact.utils.get_response_type
documentation:
Get the response type.

Args:
    payload (str): payload of response from Keba charging station

Returns:
    KebaResponseType: response type of the response

functions.name: keba_kecontact.utils.validate_current
documentation:
Validate current value.

Args:
    current (int | float): current to be 0 or between 6 - 63 A.

Validate rfid tag.

Args:

Args:

modules.name: keba_kecontact
documentation: Init file for keba_kecontact.

functions.name: keba_kecontact.create_keba_connection
documentation:
Create a KebaKeContact object as keba connection handler.

Args:
    loop (asyncio.AbstractEventLoop | None, optional): asyncio loop. Defaults to None.
    timeout (int, optional): timeout for charging station. Defaults to 3 seconds.
    bind_ip (str, optional): bind IP address. Defaults to "0.0.0.0".

Returns:
    KebaKeContact: keba connection handler

Connection management                #

methods.name: keba_kecontact.connection.KebaKeContact.get_device_info
documentation:
Get device info for a charging station with given host.

Args:
    host (str): host or IP address to get device info from

Raises:
    SetupError: Setup error will occur if timeout is reached

Returns:
    ChargingStationInfo: charging stations device info

methods.name: keba_kecontact.connection.KebaKeContact.discover_devices
documentation:
Start a device discovery.

Args:
    broadcast_addr (str): IP Address to send discovery message to,
        should be a network broadcast address

Returns:
    List[str]: List of found hosts
Public Functions                   #

methods.name: keba_kecontact.connection.KebaKeContact.setup_charging_station
documentation:
Run setup charging station into the connection handler.

Args:
    host (str): host of charging station to add to the connection handler
    **kwargs (dict[str, Any]): additional parameters for the charging station

Raises:
    SetupError: Setup error will occur if timeout is reached

Returns:
    ChargingStation: charging station object to handle functions and readings

methods.name: keba_kecontact.connection.KebaKeContact.remove_charging_station
documentation:
Remove charging station from the connection handler.

Args:
    host (str): host of the charging station

methods.name: keba_kecontact.connection.KebaKeContact.get_charging_stations
documentation:
Get a list of all configured charging stations.

Returns:
    list(ChargingStation): list of charging station objects

methods.name: keba_kecontact.connection.KebaKeContact.get_charging_station
documentation:
Get a specific charging station by host.

Args:
    host (str): host of charging station to get

Returns:
    ChargingStation: charging station object of given host

methods.name: keba_kecontact.connection.KebaKeContact.send
documentation:
Send a payload to the charging station with given host.

Args:
    host (str): host of charging station to send payload to
    payload (str): raw payload to send encoded as cp437
    blocking_time (int): blocking time in seconds. Defaults to 100 ms.
Keba-KeContact base class to handle connections to charging stations.

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.get_value
documentation:
Get value from internal data state.

Args:
    key (str): key to fetch data for

Returns:
    str | None: If key is None, all data is return, otherwise the respective value or if
non-existing key None is returned.

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.request_data
documentation: Send report 2, report 3 and report 100 requests.

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.set_failsafe
documentation:
Activate failsafe mode, for deactivation all parameters must be 0.

Args:
    mode (bool, optional): _description_. Defaults to True.
    timeout (int, optional): _description_. Defaults to 30.
    fallback_value (int | float, optional): _description_. Defaults to 6.
    persist (bool, optional): _description_. Defaults to False.

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.enable
documentation: Start a charging process.

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.disable
documentation: Stop a charging process.

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.set_ena
documentation:
Set ena.

Args:
    ena (bool): wether to enable or disable

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.set_current_max_permanent
documentation:
Set current limit.

Args:
    current (int | float): current limit in Ampere, valid range: 0 or between 6 - 63 A.
        0 stops the charging process like ena 0.

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.set_current
documentation:
Set current limit.

Args:
    current (int | float): current limit in Ampere, valid range: 0 or between 6 - 63 A.
        0 stops the charging process like ena 0.
    delay (int, optional): delay in seconds. Defaults to 1.

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.set_energy
documentation:
Set energy limit.

Args:
    energy (int | float, optional): energy limit in kWh, 0 for deactivation. Defaults to 0.

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.set_output
documentation:
Set output.

Args:
    out (int): value to set on output (1,0 or pulses/kWh from 10 up to 150)

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.start
documentation:
Authorize a charging process with given RFID tag.

Args:
    rfid (str | None, optional): RFID tag to authorize. Defaults to None.
    rfid_class (str, optional): RFID class/color. Defaults to "01010400000000000000".

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.stop
documentation:
De-authorize a charging process with given RFID tag.

Args:
    rfid (str | None, optional): RFID tag to authorize. Defaults to None.

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.display
documentation: Show a text on the display.

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.unlock_socket
documentation:
Unlock the socket.

For this command you have to disable the charging process first. Afterwards you can unlock
the socket.

methods.name: keba_kecontact.charging_station.ChargingStation.set_charging_power
documentation:
Set charging power.

For this command you have to authorize a charging process first. Afterwards the charging
power can be adjusted. The given power is the maximum power, current values are rounded down
by default to not overshoot this power value. This function is still experimental.

Args:
    power (int | float): charging power in kW.
    round_up (bool, optional): _description_. Defaults to False.
    stop_below_6_A (bool, optional): wether to stop below 6A. Defaults to True.

Returns:
    bool: _description_
KEBA charging station.
